message:
fix: disable FK enforcement on indexer writers to prevent false positives

After ~39 minutes of sustained write activity, frankensqlite's cursor
cache can report false-positive FK constraint violations (PRAGMA
foreign_key_check confirms 0 actual violations afterward).

All insert paths already ensure FK parent records exist at the
application level via ensure_agent(), ensure_workspace(), and
ensure_embedded_source_registered(), making database-level FK
enforcement redundant.

Disabled FK enforcement on all three writer code paths: ephemeral
writers, serial fallback writers, and begin-concurrent writers.

Closes #169

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
